item.title: Hetzner adapter parseInt on dropletIds propagates NaN into API request body
item.intent: A non-numeric server ID produces an immediate validation error before any API call — NaN never reaches the Hetzner API.
item.description: src/cloud/provisioning/providers/hetzner.ts:177 maps dropletIds through parseInt without validating the result. If any id is non-numeric, parseInt returns NaN, which serializes silently into the Hetzner API request body causing a confusing 422 response. Steps: (1) after parseInt(id, 10), check isNaN(numId) and throw Error with the invalid id value; (2) add test for non-numeric id inputs. Scope: ~4 lines in hetzner.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-numeric droplet ID throws Error containing the invalid id before any API call
Valid numeric IDs convert correctly and pass through — no regression
